pi_items.source: APK string search, web documentation search - no corroborating sources found
Reasonable for Android boolean preferences but no official documentation found confirming this specific value
Official Sygic GPS Navigation documentation (manula.com) states auto-zoom is located at 'Main menu > Settings > Map', not 'Settings > Route & Navigation'

privileged_info_summary: The Sygic GPS Navigation app has a real Auto-zoom feature that can be disabled. According to official Sygic documentation (manula.com), the auto-zoom setting is located at Settings > Map, not Settings > Route & Navigation as claimed in the task metadata. The specific preference key 'bAutoZoom' could not be verified in public documentation or the app's APK. The expected_value 'false' is consistent with Android boolean preferences but lacks corroborating documentation.
